title: Me and the Colonel
writer: S.N. Behrman, George Froeschel, Franz Werfel
actors: Danny Kaye, Curd Jürgens, Nicole Maurey
plot: Jacobowsky (Danny Kaye), a Jewish refugee, flees from the Germans with Colonel Prokoszny (Curt Jurgens), an aristocratic, anti-Semitic Polish officer trying to get papers to England. Prokoszny learns to appreciate Jacobowsky, desp...
